4214 r3 -> 8 BLOCKs: most were FALSE NEGATIVES (review ran vs origin/main where 368c+42d1 aren't landed, so trusted_env.py + verify.require_environment 'don't exist'). 3 genuine: (1) no CLOSE event type -> rebar closure is a STATUS event (fixed terminology; anchor=terminal STATUS-to-closed event commit); (2) _cli/__init__.py dispatch unnamed -> added as edit target (equality-test intercept arm); (3) merged-log walk is per-event -> specified per-TICKET grouping. Re-reviewing with --ref HEAD (bugzhlt4u) so stacked deps (42d1 code) are visible. NOTE: will need REBAR_GATE_REF=HEAD when claiming 4214 so its claim gate sees stacked deps too.
Two children done (368c, 42d1 closed+signed+green). Stack: 649<-650, both green.
